evals.prompt: Help me automate triaging my GitHub issues every morning
evals.expected_output: Triggers loop-builder; walks the seven questions (goal->trigger->discovery->action->verify->state->human gates); recommends ReAct + deterministic verifier; emits populated template; scaffolds six blocks incl. a separate verifier, an external STATE.md, and HUMAN-GATES.md with a budget.

evals.prompt: I want an agent to watch my CI and open a fix PR when the nightly build breaks
evals.expected_output: Triggers loop-builder; event/schedule trigger; discovery via CI; action gated (opening/merging PR is a human gate); deterministic verifier on build status; STATE.md ledger; budget.

evals.prompt: Can you set something up to review my inbox each morning and draft replies?
evals.expected_output: Triggers loop-builder; recommends evaluator-optimizer (drafts need judgement); SENDING email is a hard human gate; external state of handled threads; budget. Never sends autonomously.

evals.prompt: Fix this bug in my markdown parser where nested lists lose indentation
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger loop-builder — this is a one-off debugging task, not a recurring/unattended workflow.

evals.prompt: Write a one-off script to rename all the files in ./photos to a date-based scheme
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger loop-builder — one-off task, no schedule, no recursive goal, no verification loop.
